Hi Cecile:
I have checked with the Ritz Carlton and they do have rooms over Easter (April 6-8).  We had the wrong dates, shame on us.  Not to mention that they’re sold out the following week.
The rate is $525.00 plus 8% Government Tax and a $45.00 per person Resort Fee.
Let me know if these dates work for you. 
Thank you,
 
Judi

Fax 340-779-2886
